title: [Griffin's Keen, Inner Trail]
description: Towering overhead, a black peak can be seen blocking out the night sky.  Moonlight streams eerily down the mountainside, lighting up the snow.
Towering overhead, a black peak can be seen stabbing the blue sky with thick ebon fingers.  The sunlight reflecting on ice-covered rock is almost painfully bright.

wayto.4001: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'up'
wayto.4008: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
